title: Disable End Portals
description: Selectively disable the following using game rules: no eye of ender locating, no portal frame filling, no end portal teleportation.
body:
Three independent options, three gamerules:  
* _eyeSeekStronghold_ - toggles if the Eye of Ender can locate the Stronghold  
* _endPortalFilling_ - toggles if the Eye of Ender can be right-clicked on a portal frame  
* _endPortalCollision_ - toggles if End Portal blocks can teleport entities  

By default, all three are set to true, meaning the end is _fully enabled_. 

_~~Keywords: no end portal, no end access, no end dimension~~_
